current_facts.statement: Rust implements the frontend, HIR, MIR and xVM; Deeplus MIR is semantic authority; LLVM AOT precedes ORC JIT.
All 15 product lanes remain NOT_RUN; static publication closure and Rust scaffold buildability are not product evidence.
The R4 canonical checkpoint is current with semantic P0 equal to 0; merge, tag, GitHub Release, public terms, implementation, publication, and promotion remain separate gates.
The exact feature P1 set remains OPEN: CE-C-P1-001..006, CE-E-P1-001..008, TCC-P1-002..008, and SFD-P1-009, for 22 total.

CMA-R1 is a bounded current-projection repair authority; it advances only pointer revision/digest identity and does not change semantic P0, the exact OPEN P1/action set, product lanes, implementation authority, publication, or promotion state.
MIR-X1 remains Draft, noncanonical, and nonactivatable; GitHub Issue #24 remains open and no backend-authority supersession is inferred.
Non-authoritative projection; resolve the normative clause by authority path and digest.

open_actions.summary: Carry Expressiveness First into contributor-facing role and review guidance.
open_actions.acceptance_test: Progressive disclosure and expression-preserving alternatives are required by the updated templates.

watch_items.statement: Legacy filenames inside imported row provenance resolve through migration/path-aliases.json and never become new edit authorities.
A reviewed PR head, a synthetic merge SHA, an authority source commit, and a preserved Library object are distinct identity types.

recent_releases.verdict: canonical R4 checkpoint; semantic P0 0; exact feature P1 22 OPEN; product lanes 15/15 NOT_RUN
R4 canonical source and current integrity materialized without product-support promotion
MIR-X1 preserved as Draft, noncanonical, and nonactivatable; no backend-authority adoption inferred
